title: orthochilus holubii
intro: Orthochilus holubii, also known as the 'Mountain Orchid', is a species of orchid native to tropical Africa. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat fever, cough, and various respiratory issues. The plant is said to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, contributing to its health benefits such as reducing inflammation and fighting infections. In herbal preparations, Orthochilus holubii is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
